welcome.title: Hi, what's your plan for today?
welcome.placeholder: Send a message, upload files, open a folder, or create a scheduled task...
welcome.modelSwitchNotSupported: Model list will be available after first connection. Send a message to connect and load available models.
welcome.quickActionStar: Like us? Give us a star!
welcome.skillsMarketDesc: Search and activate community Skills on demand. Configure once, available for all agents.

history.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this chat?
history.exportDialogSingleDescription: Export current topic conversation records (JSON + Markdown) and workspace files into a ZIP package.
history.exportDialogBatchDescription: Export {{count}} selected topics' conversation records (JSON + Markdown) and workspace files into one ZIP package.
history.exportDialogHint: Folder selection follows the same interaction as workspace migration.
history.removeProjectConfirm: Remove project "{{name}}"? Its {{count}} conversation(s) will be removed too.

historySearch.title: Search conversation content
historySearch.description: Search historical messages by keyword, load more on scroll, and jump to the matched message.

noModelConfigured: No model configured. Please configure in settings.

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.pasteConfirm_message: Are you sure you want to paste '{{name}}' into the selected folder ({{target}})?
workspace.emptyDescription: Files will appear here after uploading files or opening a folder
workspace.createNewConversation: Create new chat in current workspace
workspace.dragOverlayDesc: Drag files or folders here to copy them into this workspace.
workspace.dragOverlayHint: Tip: drop anywhere to import into the selected folder.
workspace.dragNoFiles: No valid files detected. Please drag from Finder/Explorer.

contextMenu.deleteConfirm: This will delete the file from your system. Continue?
contextMenu.renameTimeout: Rename request timed out, please try again

errors.outsideSandbox: File is outside the workspace sandbox, cannot preview.
errors.notFound: File does not exist or has been deleted.
errors.timeout: Reading file timed out. Please retry.

changes.emptyDescription: File changes will appear here when AI modifies files

chat.noModelSelected: No model selected for current session, cannot send message
chat.quotaExceededBody: The current model quota is exhausted. Switch to {{model}} to continue?
chat.quotaExceededNoFallback: Model quota reached. Please switch to another available model.
chat.apiErrorNoCli: API error occurred. No CLI agent available for fallback.

speech.unsupported: Voice input is not available in this environment
speech.recordingUnsupported: Live recording is not supported here. Please upload an audio file instead
speech.genericError: Voice input failed. Please try again

sideQuestion.title: Side Question
sideQuestion.description: Ask a quick question about the current conversation
sideQuestion.noAnswer: The side question did not have a clear answer in the current conversation.
sideQuestion.parentTaskRunning: Main task still running in the background.
sideQuestion.dismissHint: Press Escape, Enter, or Space to dismiss
sideQuestion.unsupported: Side questions are not available for this conversation.
sideQuestion.alreadyRunning: A side question is already running.
sideQuestion.attachmentsNotAllowed: Side questions cannot include files or DOM snippets.
sideQuestion.emptyQuestion: Please enter a side question after /btw.
sideQuestion.toolsRequired: /btw can only answer questions based on what's already in this conversation. It doesn't have access to search, browse, or fetch new information.
sideQuestion.error: Failed to answer the side question.

commandQueue.title: Queued Commands
commandQueue.editPlaceholder: Update the queued command before it runs.
commandQueue.pausedAfterFailure: The next queued command could not start. Edit, reorder, or remove it to continue.
commandQueue.queueFull: Queue is full. Remove a command before adding more.
commandQueue.inputTooLong: This queued command is too long. Shorten it before sending.
commandQueue.tooManyFiles: Too many files are attached to this queued command.
commandQueue.queueTooLarge: Queue data is too large to persist safely. Remove some queued commands first.

skill_generator.title: Generate Skill/Rule
skill_generator.no_files: No relevant files found in workspace
skill_generator.name_required: Please enter a name for the preset

sendbox.hint: Type / for commands, @ to reference files
